SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-14-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on calendar this day for Small Claims Appeal. The Judge Pro Tem Robert J. Stumpf, Jr. Presiding. Clerk of Court: Don Feinberg. Proceedings are not reported. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Appeances:
